key_themes: Record earnings and revenue growth across segments
Analyst upgrades and strong buy ratings
Improved ROE targets and robust capital position
Expansion in investment banking and strategic hires
summary: RBC has delivered exceptional financial results, including record 2025 net income of $20.4 billion (up 25% YoY) and Q1 2026 adjusted EPS beating estimates at $4.08, driven by strong growth in personal, commercial, and capital markets segments. Analyst sentiment remains bullish with upgrades from CIBC and others, citing superior ROE generation and market resilience. No major risks identified, though broader Canadian investment outflows noted in reports could indirectly pressure the sector.
